title: Repurposed Structures - Environmental Compat
description: Make RS structures have Environmental blocks
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between Repurposed Structures and Environmental. Currently, this datapack changes RS's Swamp Villages to use Environmental's blocks and adds Environmental Village buildings to all RS Overworld Villages. It also changes Flower Forest Pyramids to use Environmental blocks (special thanks to pm095 for this change!)


- Environmental mod can be obtained from here: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/environmental

- Repurposed Structures mod can be obtained from here: https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-forge


![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ivApM40Z/images/7f6f3f11c0490b178569d87c21dcffc6e6d3aae2.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ivApM40Z/images/7f6f3f11c0490b178569d87c21dcffc6e6d3aae2.png)


**Note:** for people using CurseForge Launcher to download datapacks, use mods like Global Data & Resourcespacks to automatically load in downloaded datapacks without needing to manually move the datapacks from the resourcepack folder to the correct folders. 
https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks
